author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 10 APPROVE (clean). 4 BROKEN tests (#1036-#1039) strengthened: op-type cardinality (#1036 Relu == 1, #1038 forward Add == 1), winner_time + all_timings + winner_name (#1037), backward output_values count + saved_tensor_indices count (#1038), description compile_error substring + case-list lock (#1039). Subagent probe-before-fix correctly identified that my pre-flight's saved_tensor_indices.len() == 0 was mathematical theory not matching ferrotorch's conservative-saving implementation (== 2 for Add); read src/aot_autograd.rs:107-122 and corrected with documentation. Sabotage demo: with_candidate('interpreter') → with_candidate('typo_name') caught at all_timings name assertion. No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
